text: Hello friends, I am Dr. Prakash Patel from Sukhwana hospital and IVF center. I am laparoscopic surgeon and IVF specialist. Today is a case of seventeen years teenager female with complaint of severe abdominal pain and vomiting since two days and increase since morning. sonography was done sonography suggested left side ovarian cyst with ovarian torsion so emergency operation plan laparoscopic left side ovarian cystectomy with detorsion done followed by left side ovariopexy was done this is the video of this surgery please watch it thank you
